steps: Monitor for new or worsening symptoms and side effects of treatment.
Track energy levels and nutrition intake.
Attend all scheduled chemotherapy, radiation, or oncology appointments.
Discuss palliative care options for symptom management.
Focus on a nutrient-dense diet to support immune function.
Rest as needed but maintain light activity if possible.
Report fever or signs of infection immediately if on chemotherapy.

reviewNotes: Standardized schema. Generalized for broad applicability.
